description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named Test Python Lib that runs on push to main, devel, and deploy branches and on pull requests. The workflow has read permissions for repository contents and pull requests. It consists of multiple jobs for testing on Windows, Linux, and macOS with various Python versions, and separate jobs for building on each platform. The workflow also includes a deploy job that depends on all test and build jobs, which downloads artifacts, and uploads the build to PyPI using twine with credentials from secrets.
